'''Turak IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Turak system/Legends|Turak system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
It was a seismically-active [[Planet/Legends|planet]] covered in [[Magma/Legends|lava]] plains where the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] inflicted great damage on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], although at the cost of many [[S-1 FireHawke Heavy Repulsortank]]s.

This disaster befell the Imperials because [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maltaz]] allowed the two battalions of tanks to be cut off from their supply lines by counterattacking Rebel forces — known as the [[Hitak Harriers]] — based in the volcanic [[Hitak mountains]]. Maltaz ordered the tanks to stand their ground, and all but three tanks were lost before [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] arrived, bombarding the Rebel landing field, killing many Rebels and destroying much of their equipment.

After the loss of so many tanks on Turak IV, [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]] dramatically decreased their production of the new [[Imperial-class 1-H repulsortank/Legends|Imperial Repulsortank 1-H]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' mistakenly places the Turak system in R-4.<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
